attacking_style: Launches sustained repeated accelerations in final 3km from breakaways, using superior punch to drop co-escapees on circuit climbs and technical finales rather than single explosive attacks.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Circuit finales with short climbs that fragment breakaways in final kilometers; can handle punchy terrain despite time trial specialist background, thrives when repeated accelerations favor diesel power over pure climbing.
vulnerability: Limited observations suggest potential weakness in pure climbing scenarios or when facing multiple explosive climbers; relies on attrition rather than single decisive moves which may fail against fresher opponents.
key_patterns: Uses repeated accelerations rather than single attack to drop breakaway companions in final 3km.
Targets breakaway victories on technical circuit finales with fragmentation points rather than flat sprints.
Shows unexpected punch and climbing resilience beyond typical time trial specialist profile limitations.
form_trajectory: unknown: single race observation from 2021 insufficient to establish trajectory pattern
